header.wallet.title: your device wallet
header.cert.title: Download a public Proof of Useful Work certificate PDF — private wallet material is redacted
header.3d.title: Open the 3D knitweb knowledge-graph explorer
header.lab.title: Quantum lab — physics/quantum simulators toward a quantum-chemistry simulator
walkin.title: 🍸 Welcome to the MOLGANG bar
walkin.pitch: Grab free silk + pulses, take a seat, and knit chemistry terms with the others at your table. Peers vote with a pulse; a quorum weaves your term. No tokens to buy, nothing to sell — just knowledge. (web3, no NFTs)
walkin.name: Your name
walkin.device: 📱 This device gets its own PLS wallet — leave and rejoin from your phone and you're back in the same account. Machine-playable too: same API at /api/*.
table.knit.placeholder: brainstorm a term to knit — e.g. H2O, CO2, NaCl…
table.open: Open knits — vote with a pulse
table.spiral.blurb: A spider weaves spirals, not chains: thread 2–7 links (A → B, or a reaction like O2 + C -> CO2) together. Peers back it by staking pulses; a quorum captures it sticky.
ledger.title: 📒 My knits
explorer.title.sub: — competing knits per topic, best column first
web.title.sub: — the shared web every player extends
web.gx.placeholder: explore a term's links — e.g. V2O5 (case-insensitive)
progress.quests.sub: — tier-graded goals; reputation/XP only, no NFTs
records.title.sub: — the longest spirals captured across the bar
records.blurb: A spiral captures a sticky Fiber when peers stake pulses to confirm every link. The longer the chain you can get a table to back, the higher you rank.
monitor.title.sub: — node & p2p status · the local woven knitweb
spiral.modal.title: 🕸 Start a spiral
spiral.modal.howto: One link per line — a link A → B or A = B, or a reaction like O2 + C -> CO2 (2–7 links). Costs escalating silk; peers back it by staking pulses per link.
footer.rest: terms · bonds are Knits · molecules are Fibers · peers validate with pulses ·
err.tooMany: Too many actions. Try again soon.
err.tooManyRetry: Too many actions. Try again in {s}s.
err.offline: ⚠ Can't reach the server — is `molgang serve` running? Try again in a moment.
tutorial.walkin.title: Pick an avatar and claim the faucet
tutorial.walkin.body: Choose a name and avatar, then walk in. This creates a device wallet with starter silk and PLS.
tutorial.seat.title: Take a seat
tutorial.seat.body: Tables are where knits happen. Sit with NPC peers so your first useful work can reach quorum.
tutorial.knit.title: Knit a real term
tutorial.knit.body: Silk pays for a proposed knit. Use H2O for the first run; peers can validate it immediately.
tutorial.vote.title: Peers vote with pulses
tutorial.vote.body: Each peer stakes PLS on the verdict. A confirming quorum weaves your term into the fabric.
tutorial.fabric.title: Woven into the fabric
tutorial.fabric.body: Your knit is now a Fiber-backed contribution. Silk and PLS rewards keep useful players knitting.
table.knit.title: Stakes 1 silk — a peer-confirmed knit returns it (plus PLS rewards); a rejected knit costs it. Every level-up grants +5 fresh silk.
walkin.agegate: I am 13 or older, or have a parent/guardian's permission.
